form.formComment: At the latest run raced on the pace before fading 12th of 14 at this track Mdn on April 5 over 1230m, slow going 7 len behind Brave Dragon with 56kg at $10. The run before that held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Geraldton Cl1 on February 28 over 1117m, 1.2 len behind Salvado with 58kg at $6. Expect he will make amends.

form.formComment: Gelding by Gingerbread Man facing the starter for the first time. Runner-up in a Belmont Park trial over 1000m on March 30. He's a sibling to a couple of handy types. Looks ready to make an impression on debut following two solid trials.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Gelding by Gingerbread Man facing the starter for the first time. Runner-up in a Belmont Park trial over 1000m on March 30. He's a sibling to a couple of handy types. Looks ready to make an impression on debut following two solid trials.

form.formComment: Is first-up after a break of nine weeks and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign 12th of 14 at Bunbury Mdn February 12 over 1200m, 10 len behind Desert Waves with 56kg at $9. First up last campaign third of 10 at Ascot Mdn December 10 over 1000m, 1.5 len behind The Nun carrying 56kg at $4.60. Nice trial since her last run and she can bounce back in a big way.

form.formComment: Mare back from a spell of three months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last preparation fifth of 14 at Mt Barker Mdn January 18 over 1300m, 3 len behind Tidwell with 56kg at $8. First up last campaign fourth of 12 at Bunbury Mdn December 28 over 1100m, 2.25 len behind Dark Avalanche with 56kg at $5.50. Blinkers go on now off a break and she can be thereabouts.
